explanations.29: This line decides whether to run the deployment: it runs if manually triggered OR if the commit message doesn't start with 'wip' (meaning WIP commits are skipped).
explanations.47: This creates a cache key using the operating system name and a hash of the yarn.lock file, so different projects or lock file changes get different caches.
explanations.52: This step only runs if the previous cache step didn't find a match, avoiding unnecessary reinstalls when dependencies are already cached.
explanations.69: This converts the user's input from the workflow trigger (a string 'true' or 'false') into a boolean that the FTP action understands.
